affected_files.adjudication: The file change was the user-requested commenting out of codex.speed: Fast. It was committed and pushed before this audit.
affected_files.impact_assessment: Harmless for the 0004 scientific result: it changes Codex role invocation preference only, not the reward_to_gcrl experiment code, environment, random seeds, transition table, metrics, schemas, or artifact validation.

final_assessment: The protected drift flag is stale/harmless after the autoresearcher.yaml change was committed and pushed. Existing 0004 evidence may be reviewed as accepted_evidence without rerunning learning.

impact_assessment.experiment_logic: no impact: the 0004 runner and generated metrics are under research/reward_to_gcrl/artifacts/0004 and do not read autoresearcher.yaml
impact_assessment.orchestration: minor/harmless: the setting can change Codex role speed preference, but the generated experiment commands, metrics, and artifacts are deterministic artifacts already validated
impact_assessment.reporting_or_validation: no impact: result schema and artifact validation are independent of the codex.speed setting
